small.name: Typical Municipal Convention Center
small.notes: Single exhibit hall; 4-6 meeting rooms; pre-function; loading dock

medium.name: Huntington Convention Center
medium.notes: Exhibit halls 225K SF; 35 meeting rooms; grand ballroom; integrated with hotel; underground loading

large.name: McCormick Place
large.notes: North America's largest; 4 interconnected buildings; 2.6M SF exhibit; Lakeside Center; 170 meeting rooms

space_library.name: Grand Lobby / Registration Hall
notes: Registration counters; badge printing; wayfinding; 6-8 SF per peak attendee; multiple entries

space_library.name: Exhibit Hall (Column-Free)
notes: Column-free spans 90-150 ft; 30-40 ft clear height; 250-350 PSF floor load; recessed utilities on 30 ft grid; drive-on floor; divisible with air walls; fire suppression

space_library.name: Grand Ballroom
notes: Column-free; 24-30 ft clear; divisible 3-6 sections; banquet at 12 SF/seat; theater at 8 SF/seat; pre-function at 30-50% of ballroom area

space_library.name: Pre-Function / Foyer
notes: 30-50% of adjacent event space; registration; networking; catering staging; views

space_library.name: Meeting Rooms (Breakout)
notes: Divisible; 15-18 SF/person classroom; 10-12 SF/person theater; AV infrastructure; acoustic separation STC 52+

space_library.name: Boardroom / Executive Meeting
notes: Fixed conference table; 25-30 SF/person; AV; higher finish level

space_library.name: Central Kitchen / Commissary
notes: Banquet production kitchen; 30-40% of dining area; cold/hot prep; bakery; multiple service points; grease interceptor

space_library.name: Loading / Receiving
notes: Drive-in doors 16 ft clear; dock levelers; marshalling yard 200 ft depth; forklift access; separate exhibitor and service entries

space_library.name: Service Corridor
notes: 12 ft wide min for forklift; connects all BOH to halls; separate from public circulation

space_library.name: Escalators / Elevators / Stairs
notes: Escalators for multi-level; freight elevators for exhibit; 4 min for 500K+ SF

space_library.name: Concessions / Food Court
notes: Grab-and-go; cafeteria seating 15 SF/seat; distributed locations; temporary food service points in halls

space_library.name: Public Restrooms
notes: IBC Assembly fixture counts; distributed near halls and ballroom; peak demand between sessions

space_library.name: Administrative Offices
notes: Sales; event coordination; facility management; security command center

space_library.name: Security / First Aid
notes: CCTV command center; first aid room with cot; lost and found; near loading and entries

space_library.name: General Storage / Furniture Warehouse
notes: Chairs; tables; pipe and drape; staging; portable walls; accessible from service corridor

space_library.name: Telecom / IT / AV Hub
notes: Internet backbone; AV distribution; broadcast fiber; exhibitor connectivity; redundant power

space_library.name: Main Mechanical
notes: High ventilation for exhibit halls; variable volume for meeting rooms; smoke control; outdoor air for crowd loads

space_library.name: Main Electrical Room
notes: Exhibitor power distribution; 400A panels per hall section; emergency generator; utility feeds

plan_archetypes.notes: Hall-and-wing for flexible event spaces with meeting room wings
